feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Delete Class assignment Button Not Visible
entry.content:
Hi Team

I have one query like , in SAP MDG Master Material in classification UI the Delete Class assignment button is visible at iniator , 00 step only.  But it is not visible at other approvers level.

Please let me know how i can make button visible at different approver levels.

Thanks.

entry.title: Approach to identify and remove duplicates from SAP ECC & CRM applications
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We would like to know if there is any tool or methodology which could identify and cleanup duplicate data in CRM and ERP application such as contacts, and customers. We have a client which is currently on SAP stack and want to accelerate the data cleanup process from CRM and ERP applications. If you have developed any programs, tools, or processes which can be used then we would love to leverage those instead of manual workaround.

Regards,

Deepak Rastogi

entry.title: Cross entity BADI for BP Relationships
entry.content:
want to check entry in BP_REL in cross entity badi for BP_HEADER related entity derivation/validation
user can mark for delete entry in BP_REL, how to get this in in cross entity badi for BP_HEADER related entity derivation/validation
how to read UI values for BP_REL in derviation /validation in BP_HEADER entities like Identifiation UI

entry.title: Syniti RDG provides an effortless way to create Data Model extension.
entry.content:
Syniti Rapid Data Governance (RDG)  is an SAP UI5 Cloud-based application that builds on SAP Business Technology Platform to automate MDG customizing and enhancement through standard APIs.  It provides an elegant UI and sensible logic to help users to perform all necessary tasks for a typical SAP MDG implementation.  It can also help to empower the business to maintain a deployed SAP MDG solution without the comprehensive technical background.

In SAP Master Data Governance data can be stored in a staging or active area. Extending the data model with custom attributes or tables involves changes to the data structures in both the active and staging areas and defining a mapping between these data structures.

Traditionally, a user must perform the following steps to assign to do this configuration in SAP MDG System.  

  • Extending active area data model
  • Extending staging area data model
  • Generating MDG tables
  • Defining mapping from Staging to Active area
  • Defining mapping from Active to Staging area

RDG provides the solution to extend SMT Mapping with an intuitive, user-friendly, and graphical interface.

After a custom attribute is created and activated in either Business Partner or Material data models, an entity table for SMT mapping will be shown if applicable. (SMT mapping is not relevant for attributes created under all entities).

  1. After custom attribute is created and activation is complete mapping table will be shown.
  2. Complete the mapping table by selecting a mapping step and structure to extend for each row. Source and Target will automatically populate. Click  at the end of each row.
  3. Click Done. Processing may take some time to complete. Click Refresh  when ready and receive success messages. If running the application using a cloud platform, additional notifications will be given to help you track the process.   
  4. Extension, transformation and mapping are created correctly

  

 

 

 

Syniti RDG is a certified SAP BTP solution on the SAP App Store. 

 To know more details about the product, check the blog Partner Add-on Solutions. 

Your opinions and feedback are highly appreciated, and feel free to post them in the comment section. 

Please follow and read more interesting blogs on SAP Master Data Governance | SAP | SAP Blogs 

You can also find and post questions about the product here: SAP Master Data Governance Community

entry.title: MDG BAdI just after updating Material related tables
entry.content:
Dear Expoert,

Is there any BAdI or Enhancemanet spot just after ( or same timing ) updating Material related tables?
Because we have a problem that is  "Append fields of MARA are not updated".
When "activate button" is pushed, we can see append fields are correctly filled to entity "MATERIAL" in "CHECK_ENTITY" method ,but sometimes they are not update correctly.
Therefore we need to BAdI to investigate it furthere.

Thank you
Yuko

entry.title: Z-UIBB: Button for changes disappears
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

after upgrading our system on S/4 HANA 2022 we have a problem with our customer UIBBs.

We have implemented 3 UIBBs with z-fields. Changes to these fields do not need an approval. We use a special CR type.

When using the CR type before the upgrade we could change field entries in all customer UIBBs at the same time. Now, when we choose one UIBB we can change entries, but the maintain button of the other 2 UIBBs disappears automatically. So we cannot do anything on theses UIBBs.

If we use a CR type WITH approval everything works fine.

Any ideas?

entry.title: SLP MDG integration setups
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need your expertise on the below query.

We are working on SLP MDG integration project. We have done the integration setups (DRF config, SOAMANAGER setup...etc).

Now we can send the SLP vendors details to MDG and in MDG we can see the XML is successfully processed but CR is not getting generated. 

Not sure what we are missing? Is it really mandatory we need to implement the BADI "MDG_SE_BP_BULK_REPLRQ_IN".

Really appreciated for your help to fix this.

Regards

Ganesh Devarajan

entry.title: MDG ATC - ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT errors
entry.content:
Dear All ,


When we do ATC checks on MDG Enhancements using ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT  variant  ,we get lot of errors "Usage of not released application API " although we are using standard MDG API methods . Does any faced this problem ? Is SAP planning to release new APIs in place of existing ones to reslove these errors in future ?

Kindly share your experiences if you have come up with such problems in the past or how to resolve these errors ?

entry.title: FIORI : Is MDG/MDC required to perform Start Mass Maintenance for Business Partner in S4 Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Is it possible to perform Business Partner Mass Maintenance without MDG/MDC in S4HANA Fiori.

The requirement is to perform BP Mass Maintenance in S4HANA Fiori.

I've activated below OData Services, related ICF nodes, system alias created and required roles assigned.

ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__1405
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__147
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__194
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__986

I'm in BP Start Mass Maintenance and getting error message as "No process template for goal Basic Mass Update and OTC 147 does exist".

Is Process Template config is must to perform BP mass maintenance?

How this can be fixed.

 

Thanks,

SureshRT

entry.title: Dismantling of custom entities
entry.content:
Dear MDG community,

In our MDG system we have two custom entities for business partners. They will not be needed in the future, so we want to remove the custom entities from the MDG customer workflow and from our data model.Is this request feasible and if so, are there any instructions?

Best regards

Isabelle Köhler

entry.title: SAP MDG integration with CDQ
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for support on how to integrate SAP MDG with CDQ (Address enrichment tool). Any guidelines or step by step process available to do the integration? 

Regards

Viral

entry.title: SAP MDG: Full Forms of column names in Mapping Sheet
entry.content:
Hi SCN People, 

Hope you guys are doing well 🙂

I recently downloaded the Sheet form S Note, I checked in Legend sheet but not found, some of the column names not able to guess in below screenshot (CMP, GOV & MOP).


Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: SAP MDG: HANA Search making default for both Customer & Supplier
entry.content:
Hi SCN Folks, 

performing HANA Search for both Customer and Supplier,

Will the Customising Mode be the same on both? Why? Because initially I kept the Customising Configuration for the customer working properly, and then I went to the supplier to configure it, receiving the result that it was defaulted in the supplier but lost in the customer.

Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Automatic replication of custom table data upon update
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement in which there is a custom table with customer/vendor as key fields and other custom fields in which this will be updated from and RFC call from external system and once data is updated in the table the specific customer/vendor data has to be replicated to target systems. 

Can you guys please help me how this can be achieved.

entry.title: Hallo, ist es technisch möglich, dass wir aus dem MDG in Ariba springen? Um hier Dokumente zu sehen
entry.content: Ist dies derzeit technisch möglich, dass wir aus dem MDG direkt in Ariba springen können um hier im SLP Dokumente zu lesen oder weiter zu senden?

entry.title: Create CR type dumps internally at CL_FDT_SERVICES_INTERNAL
entry.content:
Scenario: 'Create change Request type and activate 

Standard code dumps at select statement when joining FDT_ADMN_000 , FDT_RSTL_0000 with the version table FDT_ADMN_0030 We could not find the object id causing this dump

Dump :  Any one faced dump DBSQL_TABLE_UNKNOWN CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB in the standard class CL_FDT_SERVICES_INTERNAL GET_FUNCTIONS_FOR_RULESETS line 112, please let us know any suggestions regarding this or any latest sap note to solve this.

Environment : S4HANA

Thanks !

entry.title: SAP MDG Multiobject processing Change Request Derivation scenario
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

Setup

  • MDG 9.2
  • MM Data model
  • Custom Type 1 entity
  • For this custom entity we have created a Multi object processing type change request.

We have a requirement where we need to derive the same values across all the type 1 entities within this multi object processing change request.

I understand that we can not do this using USMD_RULE_SERVICE or USMD_RULE_SERVICE_ET since there we can only perform derivations for  type 1 entity and its type 4 entities but not across multiple type 1 entities.

I understand that there might be a possibility to achieve derivation across multiple type 1 entities using access class. Can someone please help me with an example of how to use access class to achieve such functionality.

entry.title: Error message not preventing users to submit the change request in MDG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I've a new requirement to add a new field in GENERAL DATA of the change request header. And I've to make this field as mandatory based on some conditions.

Now the condition is working fine, and the error message also showing. But user can continue to submit the change request even though the error message is there. It is not stopping the user.

I've added the code for the validation in GET DATA method of the class - CL_USMD_CR_GUIBB_GENERAL_DATA (Feeder class)

Also I tried to make that as mandatory using fpmgb_s_actionusage, which is also not working as expected. in the UI it is mandatory, but it is also not preventing the user to submit the request.

 

Please correct me if I'm wrong or if any other methods to be followed. 

 

Kind Regards,

Akhil

entry.title: SAP MDG: Description not getting reflecting Change Request Tracker
entry.content:
HI SCN Folks, 

In Change Request Tracker, description not getting reflect


Like what are the ways to get fix....

 

Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Service MDG_REQ_PC is missing in SICF
entry.content:
Hello SCN,

We have activated all necessary business functions however MDG_REQ_PC service is not present while search in SICF. Note : Installed product and software version shown on fiori app documentation are available in system.

Thanks,
